projects.title: Portfolio Website
projects.description: Designed and built a personal portfolio to showcase coursework, projects, and contact information with a custom UIowa-inspired visual style.

projects.title: AI Image Captioning and Generation
projects.description: A web-based AI application that lets users upload or capture images, generate detailed captions with Moondream, create new images using Flux-Schnell through Replicate, and evaluate real versus AI-generated images with ChatGPT. The project includes a Flask web UI, API wrapper, image processing scripts, and evaluation tools.
projects.stack: Python, Flask, JavaScript, HTML, CSS, Moondream, Replicate, Flux-Schnell, ChatGPT

projects.title: Gift Wise Project
projects.description: Created a web application to help users find the perfect gifts for their loved ones based on their interests and preferences.
projects.stack: HTML CSS, Ruby, Agile Development, GitHub, Heroku Deployment
